_readme: Business rules for the bi-weekly pay sheet (/api/paysheet.xls).
Mirrors Process_Timecard v6.5.5 (Office Scripts / Power Automate).
Edit this file and the NEXT export picks it up automatically — no restart needed.
All names must be lowercase, single-spaced. '(pt)' suffixes are stripped before matching.
_noBreak_comment: Employees with NO 30-min break deduction — sheet hours = clock-out minus clock-in, no break subtracted.
_clarkEmployees_comment: Always on the Clark sheet, even when their shift name has no 'Clark' in it.
_dualLocation_comment: CSV name -> PAYROLL (IM2) row that receives the hours ADDED on top. Employee never gets a Clark row.
_exempt_comment: Machine hours are NEVER written for these employees; their row shows dashes (managed manually).
_nameCorrections_comment: CSV spelling -> correct spelling (applied to matching AND display).
_rounding_comment: Tiered rounding of net hours. minutes<=downMax -> round down; <=halfMax -> .5; else round up.
_snapClockIn_comment: Employees whose clock-IN snaps to shift start: 06:20-07:30->7:00/7:30, 14:20-15:30->15:00/15:30, 22:20-23:30->23:00/23:30 (first half of window snaps to the hour, second half to the half-hour).
_earlyOut_comment: Employees whose clock-OUT 14:20-14:59 snaps to 15:00, then soft-snaps to shift end (within 60 min after shift end: <20 min over -> shift end, 20-60 min over -> shift end + 30).
